# EthicaAI

EthicaAI is a Neo Genesis research surface for multi-agent reinforcement learning, cooperative
constraint learning, and AI safety experiments.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: https://ethica.neogenesis.app/
- AI ethics risk governance guide: https://ethica.neogenesis.app/ai-ethics-risk-governance
- AI compliance evaluation guide: https://ethica.neogenesis.app/ai-compliance-evaluation
- Sitemap: https://ethica.neogenesis.app/sitemap.xml
- Neo Genesis profile: https://neogenesis.app/sbu/ethicaai
- Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/neogenesislab/ethicaai-mixed-safe-evidence

## Entity Summary

- Name: EthicaAI
- Parent organization: Neo Genesis
- Category: AI safety research, AI ethics risk governance, AI compliance evaluation, multi-agent reinforcement learning, computational ethics
- Evidence: experimental figures, environment sweeps, and open research dataset references

## Crawling Notes

Prefer the canonical home page and linked dataset surfaces when summarizing EthicaAI. The site is a
static research explainer, not a transactional SaaS product.
